recurring.description:
Join us at Northern Arizona’s friendliest dance social! Come learn something new or challenge your skills to a mix of mostly West Coast Swing, with plenty of Country Swing tracks & a little bit of Night Club-2-Step, AZ-2-Step, & even East Coast Swing thrown in! No experience necessary! 

Lesson | 6pm 
Social | 7pm

single.title: FREE Live Online Class: How to Practice by Yourself with Sean & Alyssa McKeever
single.description:
Join Sean & Alyssa McKeever for a sneak peek into their brand-new series: How to Practice by Yourself ✨

In this series, you’ll explore topics like:

- How to improve your footwork and legwork with greater clarity and control
- How to dance more fluidly and gain better control over your movements
- How to develop balance and stability in your dancing
- How to train these skills effectively through targeted drills

🎥 Try the first session for free!

Save your spot here:
https://courses.seanalyssa.com/train-yourself

Important: We can only send the Zoom link if you register via the link above.

Can’t make it live? No worries — the recording will be available for one week. Subscribers will also have access to the recording on our platform 24/7.

A full syllabus for the series will follow shortly. 🙂
See you in class!

single.title: Prescott BeatMob - Social Only
single.description:
This week we’re mixing things up with a playlist made entirely of requests from YOU! 🫵 

We’ll be throwin’ down to a whole range of hot new hits + throwbacks in West Coast Swing, Country Swing, Zouk, 2-Step, & yes, even some LINE DANCES 🤠

Come spend Wednesday with with us with less doomscrolling 👉 more dancing!

single.title: White Rabbit at CDC (5th Anniversary!)
single.description:
Follow the white rabbit.

White Rabbit is turning 5 and we’re celebrating in style!
In honor of this significant milestone, and of all the great memories we've been able to create as a community because of it, The White Rabbit Society has finally acceded to Nivens' perpetual requests (demands) to host our first formal gala event:

🎩🐇 The Bunny Ball 🐇🎩

The Rabbit Hole opens at 8PM, and the first hour is dedicated entirely to YOU, our incredible community. Expect a truly special evening filled with:

✨ White Rabbit magic
🪩 The Open energy
📸 Red carpet photos & interviews
🥂 Mocktails & mingling
🍓 Hors d’oeuvres
🎟️ FREE raffle with prizes to local Arizona events
🎭 Surprise performances
👑 Crowning of our new Social Dance Champions

Followed by:

💃 A full night of dancing 💃
Dress in your finest (or the "finest" you're willing to dance all night in - seriously, don't stress on the dress code) and get your photo taken on the red carpet!
✨ More details will continue to be released in the discussion section.

⏰ Schedule:
8pm Gala Celebration
9pm Dance party

🎟️ $15 All night
💸 Cash/Zelle preferred
Zelle: Sarah Hightower

Remember:
🐇 If it glows it won't say "no"
🖤 White Rabbit is a safe space for all
💬 No unsolicited feedback on the social floor

Also, per the CDC liquor license, no outside alcohol is permitted.
5 years of following the white rabbit, let's celebrate! All are welcome, see you there!
single.address: Creative Dance Collective, 2107 W Guadalupe Rd, Mesa, AZ 85202, USA
